((SELECT id FROM panel_beater_quotes WHERE claim_id = 30007 AND panel_beater_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'panelbeater@kinga.com')), 'Front Bumper Assembly', 'TOY-BMP-2017-F', 'parts', 1, 450.00, 450.00, 0, 1, 67.50, 382.50),

((SELECT id FROM panel_beater_quotes WHERE claim_id = 30007 AND panel_beater_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'panelbeater@kinga.com')), 'Hood Panel Repair', 'N/A', 'labor', 1, 280.00, 280.00, 1, 0, 0, 280.00),
((SELECT id FROM panel_beater_quotes WHERE claim_id = 30007 AND panel_beater_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'panelbeater@kinga.com')), 'Paint Work (3 panels)', 'N/A', 'paint', 3, 120.00, 360.00, 1, 0, 0, 360.00),
((SELECT id FROM panel_beater_quotes WHERE claim_id = 30007 AND panel_beater_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'panelbeater@kinga.com')), 'Labor and Installation', 'N/A', 'labor', 1, 200.00, 200.00, 1, 0, 0, 200.00);
